title: Brand Intro
description: Hero image with arch overlay tagline and brand story section below.

tagline.default:
Pure Vegetarian.
Authentic.
Made with Care.

subtitle.default: Wholesome Indian vegetarian meals cooked with quality ingredients, strict hygiene, and the same care we give our own family.

story.default: Kalindi's Kuzines began in 2016 with one simple idea to share honest, home-cooked vegetarian food made with care. What started in a small home kitchen has grown into a trusted name for fresh, homestyle Indian meals across Singapore...
